description:
Create, deploy, and test a NextGen Connect channel named 'ADT_Audit_HTTP' using the REST API (https://localhost:8443/api, credentials admin/admin, header X-Requested-With: OpenAPI, Content-Type: application/xml) or the Administrator dashboard. The channel must reach a STARTED state, receive HL7v2 ADT messages via an HTTP Listener on 0.0.0.0:6661, and write them to unique .hl7 files in /home/ga/output/. Test the channel by sending the following HL7 ADT^A01 message via HTTP POST to http://localhost:6661:
MSH|^~\&|HIS|HOSPITAL|CONNECT|AUDIT|20240115120000||ADT^A01|MSG00001|P|2.3|
EVN|A01|20240115120000|
PID|1||MRN12345^^^HOSPITAL||SMITH^JOHN^A||19800101|M|||123 MAIN ST^^BOSTON^MA^02101||5551234567|
PV1|1|I|ICU^101^A|E|||1234^JONES^SARAH^M^MD|||MED||||1|||1234^JONES^SARAH^M^MD|IN||||||||||||||||||HOSPITAL|||20240115120000|
